title: Oneblocked
description: Easy to use oneblock generator mod
body:
Oneblocked - Easy to customize oneblock generator mod. Using this mod you can easily add your stages of blocks and mobs that will spawn. You can specify the order of stages and their length.
It's recommended to use the [EMI](https://modrinth.com/mod/emi) mod, to view the block stages that the game has loaded. </br>
Did you want to add custom satages? You can read how to do it [here](https://github.com/ZaksenCode/Oneblocked/tree/master?tab=readme-ov-file#custom-stage).

Special thanks for Fabric official discord server.
